results.title: Viṣṇupurāṇa
results.source: Bombay : Venkatesvara Steam Press 1910

xml_unmatched_samples.text: tvatto hi vedādhyayanam adhītam akhilaṃ guro /

aku_unmatched_samples.text: //tatra cāntarjale saṃmado nāmātibabahu prajotimātrapramāṇo mīnādhipatirāsīt //
//utpannabuddhiś ca mātaramabravīt //
//asāvapi hiraṇyapātre māṃsamādāya vasiṣṭhāgamanapratīkṣako 'bhavat //
//evaṃ devāsurāhavasaṃkṣobhakṣubdhadṛdayamaśeṣameva jagadbrahmaṇaṃ śaraṇaṃ jagām
//jayadhvajāttālajaṅghaḥ putrobhavat //

xml_unmatched_samples.text: viṣṇuḥ sisṛkṣur bhūtāni jñātvā bhūmiṃ jalānugām //

aku_unmatched_samples.text: om | brāhmaṇaḥ kṣatriyo vaiśyaḥ śūdraś ca iti varṇāś catvāraḥ ||
teṣām ādyā dvi-jātayas trayaḥ ||
teṣāṃ niṣeka-ādyaḥ śmaśāna-anto mantra-vat kriyā-samūhaḥ ||
teṣāṃ ca dharmāḥ ||
brāhmaṇasya adhyāpanam ||

results.title: Yogaśataka
results.source: Heinz Helmuth Michael Schmidt: Das Yogaśata : Ein Zeugnis altindischer Medizin, Sanskrit und Tibetisch, Bonn 1978 (Diss.).

xml_unmatched_samples.text: kṛtsnasya tantrasya gṛhītadhāmnaś cikitsitād viprasṛtasya dūram /
nirāmadehasya hi bhaiṣajāni bhavanti yuktāny amṛtopamāni // Yś_2 //

results.title: Yogasūtra with Bhāṣya (= Pātañjalayogaśāstra)
results.source: Kāśinātha Śāstrī Āgāśe: Vācaspatimiśraviracitaṭīkāsaṃvalitavyāsabhāṣyasametāni Pātañjalayogasūtrāṇi, tathā bhojadevaviracitarājamārtaṇḍābhidhavṛttisametāni pātañjalayogasūtrāṇi. sūtrapāṭhasūtravarṇānukramasūcībhyāṃ ca sanāthīkṛtāni ... Pune : Ānandāśramamudraṇālaye 1904 (Ānandāśrama Sanskrit Series, 47).

xml_unmatched_samples.text: yas tyaktvā rūpam ādyaṃ prabhavati jagato 'nekadhānugrahāya prakṣīṇakleśarāśir v
sarvajñānaprasūtir bhujagaparikaraḥ prītaye yasya nityaṃ devo 'hīśaḥ sa vo 'vyāt

aku_unmatched_samples.text: || navāntarāyāś cittasya vikṣepāḥ. sahaite cittavṛttibhir bhavanti. eteṣām abhāv
|| tatra sarvaprāṇiṣu sukhasaṃbhogāpanneṣu maitrīṃ bhāvayet. duḥkhiteṣu karuṇām.
|| kṣīṇavṛtter iti pratyastamitapratyayasyety arthaḥ. abhijātasyeva maṇer iti dṛ
|| sa na kevalaṃ samādhiprajñāvirodhī prajñākṛtānām api saṃskārāṇāṃ pratibandhī
|| sarvasyāyaṃ rāgānuviddhaś cetanācetanasādhanādhīnaḥ sukhānubhava iti tatrāsti
